notes: DAS logic is broken (fires move on every frame when held rather than properly rate-limiting after initial delay), lockTimer accumulates incorrectly inside the gravity block causing premature/missed locks, and isValidPosition references activePiece.type instead of a parameter making rotation checks unreliable, but core loop, line clearing, scoring, ghost piece, and next-piece preview all work reasonably well.

Looks recognizably like Tetris and mostly runs, but core logic has notable issues including no 7-bag randomizer/hold, simplistic/nonstandard rotation and lock behavior, and soft drop/DAS timing that make play feel inaccurate.
